titles.title: If We Weren't Meant To Be Bride

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Thank God I understand When I wake up every morning And the devil comes to me And he tells me I'm not bride Tells me I won't make it I don't have what it takes Look at what you have done Look at your mistakes

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But praise be to God for the precious blood He shed On Calvary for a sinner Like you and me So when your enemy comes To take away your faith Point him back to Calvary Where the price was paid

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If we weren't meant to be bride We wouldn't hear these secret things We wouldn't be still standing here Serving God with our everything Didn't He promised us a new body change Can you feel it now, it is your theophany There's a voice inside of me Saying we'll be leaving soon So press on by the grace of God And we will make it through

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is a place prepared For you and me It's called our future home Where we'll live eternally And though the battle here is raging With eyes of faith I see The bride of Christ New Jerusalem Oh what a glorious city

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Nothing is going wrong saints Just stand still and see The mighty hand of Jehovah God In the lives of you and me
